meaning: n.捏,夹,(寒冷等)刺骨,小饮vt.捏,夹,冻伤,剪断,阻止vi.夹,捏,刺骨,小饮,(口语)急忙adj.<贬>日本佬的
examples: There was a real nip in the air.
The presidential contest is nip and tuck.
She had a habit of taking an occasional nip from a flask of cognac.
Behind the ambulance, one of the paramedics is taking a quick nip of oxygen.
She said its aim was to nip community issues in the bud before they escalate.
